description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On May 20, 2024 at 3:02 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on 14th Street at Folsom Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling east on 14th Street and came to a stop at a red light at the intersection with Folsom Street to prepare for a left 
turn. When the light turned green, the Waymo AV proceeded into the intersection. As it did so, a passenger car traveling southbound on 
Folsom Street at a high rate of speed entered the intersection against a red traffic light. The front of the passenger car made contact with the 
driver’s side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles 
sustained damage, and the passengers of the passenger car left the scene on foot.  
Print
Clear Form
